title: Tempting Umami British Black Pudding Eton Mess
description: A high-protein, indulgent British dish featuring black pudding, served in a molcajete as an Eton mess, with a yakimono-grill twist.
instructions: Preheat the yakimono grill to 200 degrees Celsius.
Grill the sliced black pudding for 2 minutes on each side, until crispy.
In a bowl, mix together the sliced strawberries, crumbly blue cheese, and chopped walnuts.
In a separate bowl, whip the whipped cream until stiff peaks form.
To assemble the Eton mess, place a layer of grilled black pudding in the molcajete.
Add a layer of the strawberry and blue cheese mixture on top of the black pudding.
Drizzle the yakimono sauce over the top of the mixture.
Finish with a dollop of whipped cream and a sprinkle of meringue.
Drizzle the olive oil over the top of the dish.
